EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Credentials of the user {subject.account.name} are revoked when the user was deescalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
Failed to revoke credentials of the user {subject.account.name} when the user was logging out of the system on host {event_src.host}
Credentials of the user {subject.account.name} are revoked when the user was logging out of the system on host {event_src.host}
Failed to revoke credentials of the user {subject.account.name} when the user was deescalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
